generic_prompts.label: Why medicine?
generic_prompts.text: Explain your motivation to pursue medicine. What experiences solidified this path?

generic_prompts.label: Diversity / unique background
generic_prompts.text: How will your background, values, or experiences contribute to your future medical school class?

generic_prompts.label: Challenge / adversity
generic_prompts.text: Describe a significant challenge you faced and how you responded.

generic_prompts.label: Leadership
generic_prompts.text: Describe a time you demonstrated leadership. What was the outcome?

generic_prompts.label: Research interest
generic_prompts.text: Describe your research experience and how it shaped your approach to medicine.

generic_prompts.label: Service to others
generic_prompts.text: Describe your commitment to serving others, especially underserved communities.

generic_prompts.label: Gap / time off
generic_prompts.text: If you took or plan to take time off before medical school, how will you use it productively?

generic_prompts.label: AI in medicine
generic_prompts.text: How do you think AI will change medicine, and how are you preparing to practice in that world?

harvard.label: Mission fit
harvard.text: How will you contribute to Harvard Medical School's mission to alleviate human suffering?

harvard.label: Scholarly work
harvard.text: Describe your most meaningful research or scholarly project.

ucsf.label: Underserved populations
ucsf.text: Describe your experience working with underserved populations and what you learned.

duke.label: Community
duke.text: Tell us about a community you are part of and your role in it.

duke.label: What makes you different
duke.text: What is something about you that is not in the rest of your application?

michigan.label: Career goals
michigan.text: What are your career goals in medicine?

michigan.label: Contribution
michigan.text: How will you contribute to Michigan Medicine's learning community?

unc.label: NC connection
unc.text: Describe your connection to North Carolina and why you want to train here.

unc.label: Rural / underserved
unc.text: Discuss your interest in rural or underserved medicine in North Carolina.

usf.label: SELECT / mission
usf.text: How do your experiences align with USF's mission and the SELECT program's focus on emotional intelligence?

usf.label: Florida
usf.text: Why do you want to attend medical school in Florida?

fsu.label: Service
fsu.text: Describe your service to Florida communities and how it informs your path to medicine.

fsu.label: Mission
fsu.text: How does FSU College of Medicine's mission resonate with your goals?

einstein.label: Bronx / urban health
einstein.text: What draws you to training in the Bronx and serving an urban underserved population?

tulane.label: New Orleans / community
tulane.text: How will you engage with the New Orleans community during medical school?

tulane.label: Service
tulane.text: Describe your most meaningful service experience.

rush.label: Urban health
rush.text: Why are you interested in urban community medicine?

stanford.label: Innovation
stanford.text: Describe something you built, created, or improved — in any domain.

pcom_do.label: Why osteopathic medicine?
pcom_do.text: Why osteopathic medicine, and why PCOM?

rowan_do.label: Why DO?
rowan_do.text: What experiences led you to pursue osteopathic medicine at Rowan-Virtua?
